column1: Cool shot of lightning strike and developing funnel cloud in Hudson Tuesday night. 📸 Debbie Mick Kolbrick
Wow! I live in the water in Hudson. I didn't see that! 😮
This was last week in citrus county!
Lots of thunder and lightning in Springhill at 3:40 this afternoon.
Here is one that I took in Crystal River. There were 4 funnels at the same time.
I've never seen one of these, is there a specific happening before they form to watch for? Or is it luck? Thank you
This is the first time I have seen a funnel and there were 4....
My son took this pic later at Hudson also
looks like the same area I was! Near Inn on the Gulf?
It's amazing how all the funnels form over the water as opposed to onshore in FL versus the land up north. This from a midwesterner getting ready to move to Tampa soon!
I’m very frightened of lightning, our pool pump was hit the other night right under the window I was sitting 😱
We saw it today fishing 50 miles off the coast of Hudson.
What is a hatched area? That’s a new term I’m seeing!!
Last night was bad. The wind and the lightning.
one lighter tornado came through Plant City yesterday eve
Way to go Debbie Mick Kolbrick 😉
Sweet I know Debbie Mick Kolbrick !
Looks like heat lightning to me.

On my iPhone, I have a live radar. I think it came with it. And I always have live lightning on the radar. Everything looks to be out in the water where I’m at in Clearwater but boy can you see the flashes of lightning spread so far out on the live app Which is given me a new respect. That’s a beautiful photo that you just posted. Debbie did good.
